title: Who Is Peter Magyar, the Main Rival to Viktor Orban in Hungary’s Election?
summary_full: Mr. Magyar’s challenge in the Hungarian election is fueled in large part by widespread public anger at corruption and concern about sluggish economic growth.
summary_public: Mr. Magyar’s challenge in the Hungarian election is fueled in large part by widespread public anger at corruption and concern about sluggish economic growth.

HU.label: negative
HU.evidence: widespread public anger at corruption and concern about sluggish economic growth
